title: Flask app runs with debug=True
suggestion: Disable debug mode for anything other than local development; the Werkzeug debugger allows arbitrary code execution if reachable.

title: ?author= filter is exact, case-sensitive match
evidence: app.py:109 SELECT * FROM books WHERE author = ?
suggestion: Consider LIKE/case-insensitive matching if partial author search is desired; spec only requires a filter, so not a defect.

title: No pagination on GET /books
evidence: app.py:113 returns the full collection unconditionally
suggestion: Add ?limit/?offset for large collections; not required by TASK.md.
